---
title: ""
title-block-style: none
format: html
---

<div class="hero">

<img src="images/Abbey_headshot.jpg" class="profile-img">

<h1>Abbey Kealey</h1>

<p class="hero-links">
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/abbey-kealey-405473204/">LinkedIn</a> |
<a href="mailto:abbeykealey@gmail.com">Email</a>
</p>

</div>

<div class="bio">

## About Me

I'm a Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management (MGEM) student at UBC with a background in environmental and computer science.
</div>
